overall.description: A cinematic high-angle shot from a Harry Potter video game showing the Great Hall of Hogwarts at night. Students sit at long house tables beneath thousands of floating candles, while a character in white robes walks down the central aisle. The gothic stone architecture features towering stained glass windows and warm candlelight illuminating the marble floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: character in white robes walking steadily down the central aisle between the dining tables toward the far end of the hall

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air beneath the vaulted ceiling, providing warm golden illumination
long wooden house tables lined with students and laden with feast items, running parallel to the aisle
long wooden house tables lined with students, mirroring the left side of the central aisle
tall gothic arched windows with intricate blue glass patterns showing snowy night outside
tall stone walls with gothic arches and mounted torches between tall windows
large stone fireplace with active fire glowing at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a high aerial view of the Great Hall, a vast gothic dining chamber illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students fill the long house tables on either side of a central marble aisle, where a character in white robes walks toward the far end of the hall. Warm candlelight reflects off the polished stone floor while large stained glass windows reveal a snowy night outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a high aerial perspective of the Great Hall, capturing a vast gothic chamber bathed in the warm glow of floating candlelight. It begins with a wide view of the dining hall, where students are seated at long house tables flanking a central marble aisle. As the camera holds its position, the focus follows a character in white robes walking steadily toward the far end of the hall. The scene emphasizes the contrast between the interior warmth and the snowy night visible through the towering stained glass windows, while the candlelight continues to reflect off the polished stone floors.
